violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Dishes were removed from the hand sink at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

At the time of inspection, yogurt and shredded cheese were observed received above 41 degrees Fahrenheit (see Temps.) Refrigerated, TIME/TEMPERATURE CONTROL FOR SAFETY FOOD shall be at a temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below when received. Food items were placed into the freezer for rapid cooling at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

No person in charge, certified in food safety, was present as needed at the time of inspection. A person certified in food safety is to be present at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per the PIC, food safety course is to be completed within 2 weeks of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

At the time of inspection, dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. Per the PIC, utensils are to be rinsed prior to sending back to the main kitchen. Facility is not equipped with a separate sink for rinsing utensils. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

At the time of inspection, recently delivered yogurt was observed at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Yogurts were moved to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection. PIC is to check delivery temperatures of hot foods as well as cold foods to ensure delivery temperatures are maintained properly. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
At the time of inspection, the refrigerator door gasket to the Large Milk Chest Cooler lid was observed in poor repair (Separated/Torn). New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2024

At the time of inspection, there was observed to be a hole in the wall below the hand sink in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023
